key_findings: 1. Baseline accuracy: 70.0%, degraded to 39.0% (31.0pp drop), recovered to 17.0%
2. Degradation primarily in Tier 2 models (-5%/20 requests vs -2%/20 for Tier 1)
3. Self-healing quarantined 7 models during degradation phase
4. Conservation compliance did NOT reliably precede accuracy drops in this simulation
5. Recovery achieved -71% of baseline accuracy after 100 rounds with drift stopped
